berry-allen.text: Allen D Dr Berry (Republican) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-18.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Allen D Dr Berry had raised $8,512 and spent $8,683 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Allen D Dr Berry (not currently a member of Congress).

menefee-christian.text: Christian Menefee (Democratic) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-18.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Christian Menefee had raised $3,463,829 and spent $3,145,794 for this campaign.

On 25-Feb-2026, Christian Menefee voted Not Voting on H R 4758. A Yea vote passed the Homeowner Energy Freedom Act, rolling back certain federal energy-efficiency and appliance/equipment regulations that affect homeowners.

caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources.
No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build).
No public data in our set on Allen D Dr Berry's policy positions.
No public data in our set on Christian Menefee's policy positions.
summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-18. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Sylvester Turner (DEM) won by about 38.87 points out of 218720 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
